feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Did you know that in Polish Germany is called Niemcy ? Niemcy means dumb, becaus…
entry.content: Did you know that in Polish Germany is called Niemcy ? Niemcy means dumb, because when Poles met Germans for the fist time, they met people who were unable to speak something else than Ooga Booga.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: My story
entry.content: ve never posted anything like this before and I’m still not sure I should, but I’m 21 and I’ve been carrying this since I was a kid and I need to say it out loud somewhere. When I was between 4 and 12 my uncle used to watch me a lot on weekends. At first it was just him being “affectionate” in ways that felt wrong, then it turned into him touching me under my clothes, making me touch him, and eventually full sex. He would take me into his room or the basement, tell me it was our secret, that I w
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

One commenter said that troons are becoming "women" I told him that's wrong because not even women act this zombie like when it comes to troons. Don't get me wrong troons were already mentally ill.. but it's like these bitches became even more zombie and more mentally ill, and ju

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why do people pretend niggers are more oppressed than incels? You're "not allowe…
entry.content: Why do people pretend niggers are more oppressed than incels? You're "not allowed" to hate black people. If you hate black people you immediately get fired from your job, your assets seized, banned from social media, and in some countries even arrested (because you're apparently privileged). But you're perfectly allowed to hate "incels" (as long as you pretend the reason you're hating them is because of their "freely chosen personality"). Niggers don't have it worse than incels. Fact. Niggers ha
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The story was mid at best. a boring slog, and the main character has no charisma…
entry.content: The story was mid at best. a boring slog, and the main character has no charisma. nigga is way too bland, and I didn't find a single likable character in the entire game. How this is considered one of the "best" games in the AC series is beyond me. is there a single fucking AC game with a decent to good story?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /news/ News: Juan For the Road
entry.content: https://www.cbsnews.com/news/maine- shooting-ice-biddeford/ A person was killed during a shooting in Maine involving U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement on Monday morning, state House Speaker Ryan Fecteau said. The Maine Immigrants' Rights Coalition identified the person who was shot as a 26-year-old Colombian man who was authorized to work in the U.S. and had been issued a Social Security number. The police department in Biddeford, Maine, said in a statement that it responded to an inciden
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Nonnies, this is how you fix Tor.
entry.content: Open your torrc and add the next lines to it, to block 14 eyes, surveillance states, and countries that block Tor. ExcludeNodes {us},{um},{vi},{gb},{ca},{au},{de}, {fr},{be},{nl},{dk},{no},{se},{it}, {es},{il},{jp},{kr},{tw},{sg},{th}, {cn},{ru},{by},{ir},{kp} StrictNodes 1 If you want to, you can explicitly use nodes from the best countries for privacy. ExitNodes {ch},{is},{fi},{ro}
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #83678 Cursing Your Niche Edition Previous Thread: >>8403…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #83678 Cursing Your Niche Edition Previous Thread: >>84039042 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise thei
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.content: Today I went outside, touched sum grass, but I had a conversation wid another person. da problem is in dis conversation I said things dat I should not have said. It wasn't extremely weird or anything. It's juz whenever dat happens, all I can think afterwards is dat I want to kill myself. I'm physically cringing at dis fact. Okay, da blog post continues. da problem wasn't dat I said so. da problem was dat I drew a person, but dat person asked me to draw her separately, u know. Like, I drew her. I

entry.title: /o/ Auto: It's wild that you take one test as a teenager and then you're licensed for life…
entry.content: It's wild that you take one test as a teenager and then you're licensed for life. Whenever i want to rage at other drivers, I have remind myself that we share the road with: the elderly, people with disabilities (including diagnosed mental retardation), drug addicts, schizophrenics, and women. My gut tells me that requiring a driving exam every 5 years would be un-American, but our current system is so impractical. We need to get these incompetent drivers off the road.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Chat Control - The Truth
entry.content: The EU will scan absolutely every message sent over the Internet and they say it's to protect children on social media. Kids shouldn't use smartphones and social media in the first place so it's a weird justification for totalitarian control. But I have a wild new theory as to why They are implementing this. It's to kill off small social media sites. I've coded my own social media site from scratch and I'm trying to promote the early 2000s way of life where instead of everyone using the same gig
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why has it gotten so bad?
entry.content: it boggles my mind how people are shilling shitty pixels just for "muh graphene" as a panic response to sideloading/age check laws. all because 30 minutes in ADB to install lineage is too scary, and they don't get how GMS is separate from AOSP.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: how to secure an android device
entry.content: 1. install a custom rom as the stock rom can never be secure 2. enable full disk encryption if possible 3. delink the fde password that's also tied to the lockscreen password and set a new lockscreen passowrd or pin 4. set screen timeout to 15 seconds 5. install only foss apps from places like fdroid, etc 6. switch to a launcher that hides all your apps like µlauncher 7. install apps like wrongpinshutdown and duress to secure your lockscreen once done your homescreen should look something like t
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I need help, pol
entry.content: I am about to be in a 50% tax bracket and was looking at a seven-figure home for my family. As such, divorce is not viable (I hate to admit it, but this marriage is over). My wife refuses to have any more children with me (let alone sex) and it is becoming a serious issue. She moves the goalposts every time - if this keeps up, my bloodline will end here. I refuse to cheat, yet she accuses me of it constantly, even going through my devices and is upset when she finds me venting to close friends a
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is there an anti-AI Youtube Extension yet?
entry.content: It's 2026 and there's still no add-on that marks or hides videos as AI slop. Like why is there no uBlock or Sponsorblock, but for AI videos entirely. AI is the new ad spam of the 2020s. YouTube is totally flooded with AI slop, Google encourages it for some reason, and it's getting worse and worse as the months go by.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: so real talk, what happened to the days where people actually loved subscription…
entry.content: so real talk, what happened to the days where people actually loved subscriptions and loved minimilism to the point it was just a bed and a TV or a couch and a TV? Why are people all of a sudden acting like they want to own stuff? I for one welcome a society where I just put on a VR headset and all the things that would be in my room are just in the VR headset instead, or have a subscription to rent a computer rather then worry about my pc breaking and not being able to get a new video card/ram.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Let's talk about old tech
entry.content: What's the oldest piece of technology you own and actively use? What would you like to have? What do you appreciate about it? I've been using picrel more recently. It's obviously a bit of a gimmick in the age of digital music, but recording my own tapes and playing them back feels fun. And there is a certain intentionally to it, when I know that making a new tape takes 90min of recording + selecting all the songs. It was pleasant how easy it was to fix the few problems I had with it. Most modern
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Google is rolling out a new feature allowing users to change their Gmail address
entry.content: >Google allows you to change your @gmail.com username or create a new alias without losing data. Your old address automatically becomes an alias for your inbox, meaning you can keep receiving mail on both addresses and sign in to Google services with either one. Just found out about this. Did you switch to a new one?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: [Distressing News] Marathon reaches new low
entry.content: >On Monday morning, Bungies latest game Marathon, has reached an all new low peak of 1,889 on steam. >Sources from inside the company report that morale at the studio is at low point with many fearing for their jobs. With the recent cuts over at Bungie, devs do not feel safe with the current gloom mood, with some going so far as saying there will be a new round of layoffs. >This is all speculative but the numbers are not looking good. One must remember that Sony bought Bungie for 3.6 billion dol
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.content: I just installed a chess app on smartphone recently. Last time i played chess was like 30 years ago as a kid in elementary school. 99.9% of players are Indians and plenty of exotic flags i cant even identify. Meeting a representative of NATO/EU country is rare af. How is this even possible? xD BTW, i started playing literally hours ago after learning about rules and how ever chessboard piece behaves. Vid-rel is my last game i had few hours ago, and i actually paid attention. Any chess pro to exp
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Introverts where introverts aren't accepted
entry.content: I am not one to make posts such as this, but I am feeling particularly chuddy this day. I have been reflecting on picture and my life in general and man, it really sucks. I don't know how it is in other countries, but from my experience nerds in LATAM get the short end of the stick 10 times out 10. Being nerdy in North America seems much more 'mainstream' and socially acceptable than down here (Unless you're Chris Chan levels of insane). Furthermore, attempting to participate in anything outside
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /int/ International: I am 35 years old and my mom don't want me to get married because I'm disabled. …

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /doe/ - Noelle Holiday General #1164
entry.content: The Home of Doerot & Kriselle.
